# zstack_ceph_primary_storage (Resource)

Manages a ZStack Ceph Primary Storage resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mon_urls` (List of String) List of Ceph monitor URLs.
- `name` (String) The name of the Ceph primary storage.
- `zone_uuid` (String) The UUID of the zone where the Ceph primary storage will be created.

### Optional

- `data_volume_pool_name` (String) The Ceph pool name for data volumes.
- `description` (String) The description of the Ceph primary storage.
- `image_cache_pool_name` (String) The Ceph pool name for image cache.
- `root_volume_pool_name` (String) The Ceph pool name for root volumes.

### Read-Only

- `available_capacity` (Number) Available capacity in bytes.
- `state` (String) The state of the primary storage.
- `status` (String) The status of the primary storage.
- `total_capacity` (Number) Total capacity in bytes.
- `type` (String) The type of the primary storage.
- `url` (String) The URL of the primary storage.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the Ceph primary storage.
